use_cases: Dynamic hero section with interactive fractal tree visualization that responds to mouse movement
Portfolio or creative showcase landing page with generative art background
Decorative animated element for creative software or design tool interfaces
Interactive art installation component for media websites
Ambient visual background for SaaS landing pages seeking distinctive aesthetics
ai_summary: A generative art component that renders an animated fractal tree on HTML5 Canvas with recursive branching algorithms. The visualization features white-to-transparent branches on a dark background with depth achieved through opacity gradients. Mouse position influences branch angles in real-time, creating an interactive organic tree effect. Uses Framer Motion for orchestration and Lucide icons for potential CTAs.
